headline: Is Intuit Inc. (INTU) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is INTU a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Intuit Inc. on Bob’s Payment Stock Substack by Bob Hammel. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on INTU. Intuit Inc.’s share was trading at $408.68 as of April 22nd. INTU’s trailing and forward P/E were 26.59 and 15.36 respectively according […]

headline: Deutsche Bank Reaffirms Buy on Intuit (INTU) After TurboTax Survey Insights
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) ranks among the stocks to invest in before they split next. On April 23, Deutsche Bank reaffirmed its Buy rating and $600 price target for Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU). In partnership with dbDataInsights, the firm surveyed 745 taxpayers to compare tax preparation strategies utilized this year and the previous year. According to the […]
